summary: Iteration 233 - Command Mode, Pub/Sub Events, and Sovereign Tier Middleware Testing Complete. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). All new features working: (1) SovereignTierMiddleware adds X-Sovereign-Tier, X-Response-Time, X-Tier-Priority headers to ALL /api responses. (2) POST /api/sovereign/command works with 5 contexts (mixer/meditation/trade/wellness/general), returns thinking chain with 2-3 agents + AI response. (3) POST /api/sovereign/events/publish publishes events. (4) GET /api/sovereign/events/recent returns recent events. Frontend: Command Mode trigger (Zap button) visible in bottom-right, Ctrl+K opens modal, modal has context label, tier badge, input field, Orchestrate button, quick suggestions. Sovereign Architecture page loads with all 4 tabs.

issues: Trial Graduation modal blocks interaction on first visit - user must dismiss it. This is expected behavior from iteration 232.

critical_code_review_comments: SovereignTierMiddleware correctly intercepts ALL /api requests and adds X-Sovereign-Tier, X-Response-Time, X-Tier-Priority headers
Command Mode endpoint correctly implements 5 COMMAND_CONTEXTS with context-specific system prompts
Thinking chain correctly includes Alpha (Geometer) and Beta (Harmonizer) agents, Gamma (Logistics) only for artisan+ or purchased agent_session
Pub/Sub events correctly stored in sovereign_events collection with user_id, event_type, payload, timestamp
Frontend CommandMode.js correctly implements Ctrl+K shortcut, modal with context label, tier badge, input field, quick suggestions
SovereignContext.js correctly implements EventBus class for pub/sub, priority queue, executeCommand method
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with purchased thinking_feed unit
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 233 verified all new infrastructure features: (1) SovereignTierMiddleware adds 3 headers (X-Sovereign-Tier, X-Response-Time, X-Tier-Priority) to ALL /api responses - tested on /api/sovereign/status, /api/sovereign/tiers, /api/mixer/subscription, /api/dashboard/stats. (2) Command Mode endpoint POST /api/sovereign/command works with 5 contexts: mixer (Divine Director), meditation (Meditation Guide), trade (Trade Circle), wellness (Wellness Advisor), general (General). Returns thinking_chain with 2-3 agents + ai_response from Gemini. (3) Pub/Sub: POST /api/sovereign/events/publish stores events, GET /api/sovereign/events/recent retrieves last 20 events. (4) Frontend CommandMode.js: Zap button trigger in bottom-right (fixed position), Ctrl+K shortcut, modal with context label, tier badge, input field, Orchestrate button, quick suggestions. (5) Test user grad_test_522@test.com has purchased 'thinking_feed' unit so can use Command Mode. (6) New users get 7-day trial with 'plus' tier (maps to apprentice) which includes thinking_feed by default.

middleware_x_sovereign_tier_header.details: X-Sovereign-Tier header present on all /api responses with valid tier value (standard/apprentice/artisan/sovereign)

middleware_x_response_time_header.details: X-Response-Time header present on all /api responses in format '0.XXXs'

middleware_x_tier_priority_header.details: X-Tier-Priority header present on all /api responses with value 0-3

command_mode_mixer_context.details: POST /api/sovereign/command with context='mixer' returns thinking_chain, context_label='Divine Director', 2+ agents

command_mode_wellness_context.details: POST /api/sovereign/command with context='wellness' returns context_label='Wellness Advisor'

command_mode_meditation_context.details: POST /api/sovereign/command with context='meditation' returns context_label='Meditation Guide'

command_mode_trade_context.details: POST /api/sovereign/command with context='trade' returns context_label='Trade Circle'

frontend_command_mode_trigger.details: Zap button visible in bottom-right corner (fixed position)

frontend_command_mode_ctrl_k.details: Ctrl+K keyboard shortcut opens Command Mode modal

frontend_command_mode_modal.details: Modal has context label, tier badge, input field, Orchestrate button, quick suggestions

frontend_sovereign_page_4_tabs.details: /sovereign page loads with all 4 tabs: Overview, Compare Tiers, Cross-Tier Shop, Glass Box
